message:
test(web/sse): add 13 unit tests for SSE parsing and serialization

Expand test coverage for the web SSE module (was 2 tests, now 15):

- parse_event_stream_channel: default-to-All, explicit "all", singular
  forms ("delta", "detection", "signal")
- parse_stream_max_hz: default when absent, explicit value, clamped to
  max, zero-uses-default, invalid-uses-default
- SseEvent serialization: data-only, event_type+id, multiline data,
  comment, empty data

These are pure function tests with no async or I/O dependencies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
